title: AI will only replace ignorant professionals, Neuroscientists warn
description: Medical experts and academics have warned that Artificial Intelligence (AI) will not replace human scientists, but will inevitably take the jobs of professionals who refuse to adapt to emerging digitalThe post AI will only replace ignorant professionals, Neuroscientists warn appeared first on The Nation Newspaper.

title: Tinder wants you to give its AI access to all of your photos
description: Would you trust Tinder enough to let its AI scan your entire gallery?

title: Google Discontinues AI Health Feature Filled with Misleading Advice
description: Google has quietly discontinued an AI search feature that offered users health advice crowdsourced from non-medical professionals worldwide. The post Google Discontinues AI Health Feature Filled with Misleading Advice appeared first on Breitbart .

title: AI Is Changing The Game For Lenders' Vendor Governance
description: Recent guidance from Freddie Mac and the Treasury Department reinforces that expectations surrounding AI oversight are beginning to shape how mortgage lenders operationalize vendor governance, which is emerging as a critical compliance challenge for the decade ahead, says Alexandra Temple at Mitchell Sandler.

title: The CEO of Patreon blasts AI companies for the ‘bogus excuse’ they’re using to not pay artists
description: Jack Conte says AI firms' fair use claims fall apart when you look at their Disney and Warner deals.
